name: Darren
observedShift: He has been arriving late at work

focusPoints.label: Arriving late — pattern or anomaly?
focusPoints.reason: Notes mention arriving late at work. Could be a sign of disengagement, personal issues, or just a temporary schedule change — worth clarifying before drawing conclusions.

focusPoints.label: Trust and alignment with the board.
focusPoints.reason: Role-driven — board/exec relationships are a core CTO surface and a frequent blind spot, especially if something feels off.

focusPoints.label: Judgment on strategic tradeoffs recently.
focusPoints.reason: Performance and feedback for an exec centres on the calls made, not throughput — judgment is the load-bearing competency.

issues: goodOutcome may be too generic — add seniority, role, or level-specific artefact (lead scope, ownership, etc.)
coreIssue does not reference role or seniority — may be too generic
